free_text: Location of the low-energy isoscalar octupole
resonance in 58Ni
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Laboratory of Nuclear Study, Faculty of
Science
Main reference. See also TITLE and AUTHOR.
M.Fujiwara, Numerical data
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 0.473 mg/cm**2.
- Target is self supported.
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Detector resolution is 15 to 22 keV.
To analyze and detect inelastically
scattered protons with spectrograph
